subcodes.first_line: O Name of God! Hearken unto that which the Fire proclaimeth from the Tree, that verily there is none other God but Him, and that 'Alí [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسم الها فاستمع ما ینادی النار فی الشجره بانه لا اله الا هو و ان علیا
